description: Test cases where context clearly and unambiguously answers the question

cases.query: What is the company's return policy?
contexts: Return Policy: All items may be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Return shipping is free for orders over $50.
cases.description: Clear policy question with explicit policy statement
cases.rationale: Context directly and completely answers the question about return policy

contexts: System Requirements: Windows 10/11 or macOS 12+, 8GB RAM minimum (16GB recommended), 500MB disk space, Intel Core i5 or equivalent processor.
cases.description: Technical requirements question with explicit specifications
cases.rationale: Context provides complete and specific system requirements

cases.query: When is the next board meeting?
contexts: The next quarterly board meeting is scheduled for February 15, 2024 at 2:00 PM EST in the main conference room. All board members have confirmed attendance.
cases.rationale: Context provides exact date, time, and location with confirmation

cases.query: How do I reset my password?
contexts: Password Reset Instructions: 1) Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. 2) Enter your email address. 3) Check your email for the reset link. 4) Click the link and enter your new password. 5) Your new password must be at least 8 characters with one number and one special character.

cases.query: What is the price of the Pro plan?
contexts: Pricing: Basic Plan - $9/month, Pro Plan - $29/month, Enterprise Plan - Custom pricing. All plans include a 14-day free trial. Annual billing gives 20% discount.
cases.description: Pricing question with explicit price list
cases.rationale: Context explicitly states Pro plan price as $29/month

cases.query: Who is the CEO of the company?
contexts: Leadership Team: Sarah Johnson serves as Chief Executive Officer, having joined in 2019. She previously held executive positions at Google and Microsoft.
The executive team also includes CFO Michael Chen and CTO David Park.
cases.rationale: Context explicitly names Sarah Johnson as CEO

contexts: SDK Support: We provide official SDKs for Python, JavaScript, Ruby, Go, and Java. Community-maintained SDKs are available for C#, PHP, and Rust.
cases.description: Technical support question with explicit list
cases.rationale: Context provides complete list of officially supported languages

cases.query: What is the API rate limit?
contexts: Rate Limits: Free tier - 100 requests/minute, Pro tier - 1,000 requests/minute, Enterprise - unlimited. Rate limit headers are included in all responses.
cases.description: Technical limits question with specific numbers
cases.rationale: Context provides explicit rate limits for each tier
